changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO allocations ( tenant_id, party_id, positive_type, positive_id, negative_type, negative_id, amount, allocated_at, notes ) SELECT p.tenant_id, p.party_id, CASE p.type WHEN 'CUSTOMER_PAYMENT' THEN 'PAYMENT' WHEN 'CUSTOMER_DEPOSIT' THEN 'PAYMENT' WHEN 'SUPPLIER_PAYMENT' THEN 'SUPPLIER_PAYMENT' END, p.id, CASE pa.target_type WHEN 'SALE_INVOICE' THEN 'INVOICE' WHEN 'PURCHASE_INVOICE' THEN 'PURCHASE_INVOICE' END, pa.target_id, pa.allocated_amount, COALESCE(p.confirmed_at, pa.created_at), 'Backfilled from payment_allocations (changeset 0052)' FROM payment_allocations pa JOIN payments p ON p.id = pa.payment_id WHERE p.status = 'CONFIRMED' AND p.type IN ('CUSTOMER_PAYMENT', 'CUSTOMER_DEPOSIT', 'SUPPLIER_PAYMENT') AND pa.target_type IN ('SALE_INVOICE', 'PURCHASE_INVOICE') AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM allocations a WHERE a.positive_id = p.id AND a.negative_id = pa.target_id );

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO allocations ( tenant_id, party_id, positive_type, positive_id, negative_type, negative_id, amount, allocated_at, notes ) SELECT cc.tenant_id, cc.party_id, 'CUSTOMER_CREDIT', ccu.customer_credit_id, 'PAYMENT', ccu.payment_id, ccu.amount_used, ccu.created_at, 'Backfilled from customer_credit_usages (changeset 0052)' FROM customer_credit_usages ccu JOIN customer_credits cc ON cc.id = ccu.customer_credit_id WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM allocations a WHERE a.positive_type = 'CUSTOMER_CREDIT' AND a.positive_id = ccu.customer_credit_id AND a.negative_id = ccu.payment_id );

changeSet.author: hisab-erp
changeSet.sql: -- Phase 6: mirror historical CREDIT_NOTE → INVOICE applications. -- For non-DRAFT credit notes whose application carried a non-zero -- imputed amount (cn.amount minus any surplus that minted a fresh -- customer_credits row via the OVERPAYMENT branch of createCreditNote). INSERT INTO allocations ( tenant_id, party_id, positive_type, positive_id, negative_type, negative_id, amount, allocated_at, notes ) SELECT cn.tenant_id, cn.party_id, 'CREDIT_NOTE', cn.id, 'INVOICE', cn.invoice_id, cn.amount - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cc.initial_amount) FROM customer_credits cc WHERE cc.source = 'OVERPAYMENT' AND cc.notes LIKE 'Credit note ' || cn.number ), 0), cn.created_at, 'Backfilled from credit_notes (changeset 0052)' FROM credit_notes cn WHERE cn.status <> 'DRAFT' AND (cn.amount - COALESCE(( SELECT SUM(cc.initial_amount) FROM customer_credits cc WHERE cc.source = 'OVERPAYMENT' AND cc.notes LIKE 'Credit note ' || cn.number ), 0)) > 0 AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM allocations a WHERE a.positive_type = 'CREDIT_NOTE' AND a.positive_id = cn.id );
